creation_metrics.typical_build_time: minutes to a couple of days

ai_agent_team.role: Generates game art, sprites, backgrounds, VFX
Crafts intuitive in-game UI and HUD
Writes story, dialogue, quests, interactive text
AI-guided ideation + assembles a game-specific custom editor

creation_workflow: AI-Guided Brainstorming — spark or refine the concept in natural language
Agentic Generation — specialized agents produce art, UI, audio, narrative & mechanics
Game-Specific Editor — a bespoke, partially-generated edit mode for iteration
One-Tap Remix & Publish — clone, tweak, and re-share any public game

creator_personas.note: Segment shares below are ILLUSTRATIVE — modeled from qualitative statements in Fortune & Astrocade blog, not published percentages.
creator_personas.top_user_segment: Women aged 20-40 (surprising vs. the classic 10-15 male gamer segment)

segments.descr: No prior dev or coding experience; many top earners come from outside the games industry
Clone and tweak existing games via one-tap remix
Compete in bi-weekly game jams for cash + spotlight

monetization_funnel.gate_monetization: 100K significant plays in 30 days unlocks earnings
